name: Active Recall
description: Search remembered conversation and workspace context before each assistant turn.

capabilities.title: Active Recall
capabilities.description: Find relevant prior context before the main model answers the user.

capabilities.title: Active Recall Settings
capabilities.description: Workspace controls for the Active Recall context provider.

env.name: ACTIVE_RECALL_ENABLED
env.label: Active Recall Enabled
env.description: Whether Active Recall runs before assistant turns in this workspace.

env.name: ACTIVE_RECALL_MODEL
env.label: Active Recall Model
env.description: Model used by the Active Recall sub-agent.

env.name: ACTIVE_RECALL_SEARCH_WORKSPACE
env.label: Search Workspace Files
env.description: Whether Active Recall can search workspace files for context.

env.name: ACTIVE_RECALL_TIMEOUT_S
env.label: Active Recall Timeout
env.description: Maximum seconds spent by the Active Recall sub-agent.

env.name: ACTIVE_RECALL_SYSTEM_PROMPT
env.label: Active Recall System Prompt
env.description: Optional replacement prompt for the Active Recall sub-agent.
